brief.audience: healthcare professionals concerned with HIPAA compliance and security
brief.coreMessage: Ensuring HIPAA compliance and security in healthcare communications

headlines: Ensure HIPAA-compliant healthcare communications with Telnyx Voice AI
Telnyx Voice AI delivers sub-200ms latency with HIPAA and SOC 2 compliance
Secure healthcare calls with Telnyx’s HIPAA-ready Voice AI platform
One platform for secure, compliant healthcare communications in 140+ countries
Telnyx owns its network to guarantee 99.999% uptime and HIPAA compliance
Reduce latency and meet HIPAA standards with Telnyx Voice AI
Healthcare communications secured with Telnyx’s SOC 2 Type II certified platform
Telnyx Voice AI integrates telephony and inference for sub-200ms response times
Manage healthcare communications securely on one platform with Telnyx Voice AI
Telnyx ensures HIPAA compliance and security across global healthcare networks
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI offers a single platform for healthcare communications, owning its network to maintain 99.999% uptime. It meets HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, and PCI compliance standards, ensuring secure and low-latency voice interactions under 200ms across 140+ countries.

Healthcare providers face strict HIPAA compliance and security demands. Telnyx Voice AI addresses these by combining telephony and AI inference on a proprietary network, delivering sub-200ms latency and compliance with HIPAA, SOC 2, and PCI requirements on one platform.

Telnyx Voice AI supports healthcare communications with a HIPAA-ready infrastructure and SOC 2 Type II certification. By owning the network and co-locating inference with telephony, it guarantees secure, low-latency voice services with 99.999% uptime in over 140 countries.

With Telnyx Voice AI, healthcare organizations can rely on a single platform that ensures HIPAA compliance, SOC 2 Type II security, and PCI standards. The platform’s sub-200ms latency and network ownership reduce risks in healthcare communications globally.

Telnyx Voice AI combines secure telephony and AI inference on its own network, enabling healthcare professionals to maintain HIPAA compliance and SOC 2 Type II standards. It delivers reliable, low-latency communications with 99.999% uptime in more than 140 countries.
